name: atlas
description: Deploy-anywhere text-to-SQL agent with auto-generated semantic layer and production-grade security

scripts.dev: bun run --hot packages/api/src/api/server.ts & API_PID=$!; trap 'kill $API_PID 2>/dev/null' EXIT; bun run --filter '@atlas/web' dev
scripts.test: bun run --filter '@atlas/api' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/cli' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/mcp' test && bun run --filter '@atlas/web' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sdk' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/plugin-sdk' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/jira' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/yaml-context' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/mcp' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/clickhouse' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/mysql' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/duckdb' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/snowflake' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/salesforce' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/email' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/slack' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/nsjail' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/sidecar' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/vercel-sandbox' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/daytona' test && bun run --filter '@useatlas/e2b' test
scripts.test:browser:prod: bun x playwright test --config e2e/browser/playwright.config.ts --project production
scripts.deps:update: bun update && bun x syncpack fix
